name: Cisco Catalyst 9300 24-port
shortDescription: Lead stackable enterprise switching platform, built for security, IoT, and cloud.
longDescription: The Cisco® Catalyst® 9300 Series Switches are Cisco’s lead stackable enterprise switching platform built for security, IoT, mobility, and cloud. They are the next generation of the industry’s most widely deployed switching platform.

reviews.author: John D.
reviews.title: Incredible Switch
reviews.body: This Catalyst 9300 is a powerhouse. We replaced our old 3750s and the performance jump is night and day.

reviews.author: IT Pro Weekly
reviews.title: Solid Enterprise Choice
reviews.body: A bit pricey, but you get what you pay for. The security features are top-notch.

reviews.author: NetworkOps Team
reviews.title: Seamless Stack Performance
reviews.body: We stacked 4 units in our campus access layer and saw seamless failover and near-instant provisioning.

questions.author: Mike S.
questions.question: Does this model come with rack-mount ears?
questions.answer: Yes, all 9300 series 1RU switches ship with the rack-mounting kit included.

questions.author: Sarah L.
questions.question: What is the warranty on this item?
questions.answer: This unit comes with the Cisco Enhanced Limited Lifetime Warranty (E-LLW).

name: Cisco SFP-10G-SR
shortDescription: 10GBASE-SR SFP+ transceiver module for multimode fiber up to 300m.
longDescription: The Cisco SFP-10G-SR is a hot-swappable input/output device that plugs into a 10 Gigabit Ethernet port or slot. It provides a 10GBASE-SR interface over multimode fiber and supports link lengths up to 300 meters on OM3 MMF and 400 meters on OM4 MMF.

reviews.author: NetworkOps
reviews.title: Reliable Transceiver
reviews.body: We've used these across multiple 10G links — zero failures and great signal integrity.

reviews.author: DC Engineer
reviews.title: Plug and Play
reviews.body: Easy to install and compatible with both Nexus and Catalyst switches.

questions.author: Leo K.
questions.question: Is this compatible with non-Cisco switches?
questions.answer: It’s officially supported for Cisco devices, but may work with third-party switches that support SFP+ standards.

questions.author: Sophie D.
questions.question: Does it include a dust cap?
questions.answer: Yes, each transceiver ships with protective dust caps on both LC connectors.

name: Dell PowerEdge R760
longDescription: The Dell PowerEdge R760 is a 2U, dual-socket server that delivers the performance you need for your most demanding applications.

reviews.author: SysTech
reviews.title: Solid Performer
reviews.body: Very stable under high compute workloads. The iDRAC 9 interface is a big plus.

questions.author: Ken P.
questions.question: Does this support NVMe drives?
questions.answer: Yes, up to 24 NVMe drives depending on configuration.

name: Fortinet FortiGate 100F
shortDescription: Fast and secure SD-WAN solution for enterprise branch offices.
longDescription: The FortiGate 100F series provides a fast and secure SD-WAN solution in a compact desktop form factor for enterprise branch offices and mid-sized businesses.

reviews.author: SysAdmin
reviews.title: Great value SD-WAN
reviews.body: You can't beat the price/performance for SD-WAN.

reviews.author: ITSec Review
reviews.title: Solid Security
reviews.body: Great NGFW with easy GUI and centralized FortiManager support.

questions.author: Nina K.
questions.question: Can it be rack-mounted?
questions.answer: Yes, it comes with a rack-mount kit.

name: Juniper MX204 Router
shortDescription: Space- and power-optimized router for enterprise and service providers.
longDescription: The MX204 Universal Routing Platform is a space- and power-optimized router that’s ideal for enterprise and service provider applications.

reviews.author: ISP Core Eng
reviews.title: Fantastic Edge Router
reviews.body: Handles BGP sessions and routing flawlessly.

questions.author: NetworkEng
questions.question: Is this standalone or license-based?
questions.answer: It operates as a standalone router running Junos OS. Advanced features may require separate software licenses.

name: Palo Alto PA-460
shortDescription: ML-Powered Next-Generation Firewall (NGFW) for branch offices.
longDescription: The PA-400 Series, including the PA-460, brings ML-Powered NGFW capabilities to distributed enterprise branch offices.

reviews.author: SecurityOps
reviews.title: Strong and Reliable
reviews.body: The ML engine catches threats that older models missed.

questions.author: Liam R.
questions.question: Does it support SD-WAN?
questions.answer: Yes, SD-WAN is included in the PAN-OS feature set.

name: Aruba 6300M 24-port
shortDescription: Flexible and intelligent AOS-CX stackable switches for access/aggregation.
longDescription: The Aruba CX 6300 Switch Series is a modern, flexible, and intelligent family of AOS-CX stackable switches ideal for access, aggregation, and data center top-of-rack (ToR) deployments.

reviews.author: CampusNet
reviews.title: Smart and Reliable
reviews.body: AOS-CX management is intuitive and stable.

questions.author: Tom L.
questions.question: Does it support PoE?
questions.answer: Yes, specific models in the series provide full PoE+ support.

name: Cisco Catalyst 9800-L
shortDescription: Fixed wireless controller for small and midsize enterprises.
longDescription: The Cisco Catalyst 9800-L is a fixed wireless controller with seamless software updates for small and midsize enterprises.

reviews.author: WirelessPro
reviews.title: Reliable Controller
reviews.body: Deployment with DNA Center was smooth and stable.

questions.author: Harry G.
questions.question: Does this include AP licenses?
questions.answer: No, AP licenses are purchased separately.

name: Dell PowerSwitch S4148F
shortDescription: Top-of-Rack (ToR) switch for high-performance data centers.
longDescription: The S4148F-ON is a 1RU, high-density 10/25/40/50/100GbE ToR switch for high-performance data centers. It features Open Networking support.

reviews.author: CloudInfra
reviews.title: Great Open Networking
reviews.body: ONIE support makes it flexible for custom OS installs.

questions.author: Jade P.
questions.question: Is it compatible with SONiC?
questions.answer: Yes, officially supported for Dell OS10 and SONiC.

name: HPE Aruba 2930F 48G
shortDescription: Layer 3 access switch with 48 Gigabit ports and SFP+ uplinks.
longDescription: The Aruba 2930F Switch Series is designed for customers creating digital workplaces optimized for mobile users. These Layer 3 access switches are easy to deploy and manage with advanced security and network management tools.

reviews.author: SmallBizNet
reviews.title: Good access switch
reviews.body: Easy to configure and stable for small networks.

name: Cisco ISR 4331
shortDescription: Modular integrated services router for secure WAN access.
longDescription: The Cisco 4000 Series Integrated Services Routers (ISR) deliver comprehensive WAN security and network services for branch offices. The 4331 model is ideal for mid-size deployments requiring scalability and performance.

reviews.author: BranchIT
reviews.title: Solid and Reliable
reviews.body: We’ve used the ISR 4331 for years across branch offices—reliable and easy to manage.

reviews.author: NetOps
reviews.title: Still a Classic
reviews.body: The ISR series remains dependable even as SD-WAN grows.

questions.author: Ethan M.
questions.question: Does this support dual power supplies?
questions.answer: No, the ISR 4331 supports a single internal AC or DC power supply.

questions.author: Priya R.
questions.question: Can this be upgraded for higher throughput?
questions.answer: Yes, performance licenses can increase throughput via Cisco Boost.

name: HPE ProLiant DL380
shortDescription: Scalable 2U 2P solution with exceptional compute performance density.
longDescription: The HPE ProLiant DL380 Gen11 server is a scalable 2U 2P solution that delivers exceptional compute performance density and scalability for diverse workloads.

reviews.author: Data Center Ops
reviews.title: Workhorse Server
reviews.body: The Gen11 is a beast. We've deployed 10 of these for our new VM cluster and they haven't skipped a beat.

reviews.author: ServerAdmin
reviews.title: Dense and Reliable
reviews.body: Excellent rack density, good cooling design and solid performance under VMware workloads.

questions.author: Alex
questions.question: What kind of power supplies does this take?
questions.answer: It supports dual redundant 800W or 1600W Flex Slot Platinum hot-plug power supplies.

questions.author: Maria L.
questions.question: Does it support PCIe Gen5 GPUs?

name: Dell PowerEdge R760
longDescription: The Dell PowerEdge R760 is a 2U, dual-socket server that delivers the performance you need for your most demanding applications.

reviews.author: SysTech
reviews.title: Solid Performer
reviews.body: Very stable under high compute workloads. The iDRAC 9 interface is a big plus.

questions.author: Ken P.
questions.question: Does this support NVMe drives?
questions.answer: Yes, up to 24 NVMe drives depending on configuration.
